forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear. Low around 56, with temperatures rising to around 58 overnight. West southwest wind around 3 mph.

forecast.name: Tuesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny. High near 84, with temperatures falling to around 81 in the afternoon. Northwest wind 2 to 7 mph.

weather_report:
In the heart of Downtown San Francisco, the overnight hours give way to a promising Tuesday that greets the day with clarity. The skies gently lifted from their nocturnal tranquility, revealing a canvas unmarred by fog, as the city stirs awake beneath a sun that will soon rise high, casting its warmth across the urban expanse. With morning temperatures embracing the mid-fifties, a cool breeze whispers through the streets, urging layers, yet hinting at pleasant wonders just beyond the horizon. 

As the day matures, a golden sunshine warms the air, promising highs near the mid-eighties by afternoon. The gentle northwest winds carry the laughter and energy of those venturing outside, inviting urban explorers to indulge in the delights of the day. Secure a seat at a café, perhaps along a vibrant street or by the bay, and sample the rich flavors of the city, or take a leisurely walk along the Embarcadero, letting the cool air mingle with your thoughts. Layer wisely this morning—a light jacket will suffice for the early chill—but prepare to shed it as the warmth envelops the day, allowing you to fully embrace the unique beauty of San Francisco in spring.
